Features Pricing Dashboard Support
Login with Discord

Everything your server
needs to operate.

Tundra Systems is packed with tools built specifically for serious ER:LC communities.

ER:LC API Access

We integrate the ER:LC API into our CAD with no additional cost, including live maps, player counters, and much more.

Custom Records

We have a huge list of customizable records and the ability to add your own records tailored to your community's needs.

Discord Integration

We have permission syncing between Discord roles and CAD permissions. Simply add our "Tundra Systems" bot to your server.

Searchable Records

With our advanced searching system, you can setup custom search types to search anything on your records!

✦   and much much more on the way...
